name: ReefDash
postStartCommand:
sed -i 's|/var/www/html|/workspaces/reefdash|g' /etc/apache2/sites-available/000-default.conf && echo '<Directory /workspaces/reefdash>
  Options Indexes FollowSymLinks
  AllowOverride None
  Require all granted
</Directory>' >> /etc/apache2/apache2.conf && chmod -R 755 /workspaces/reefdash && service apache2 start
